text.title: Strategy Basics Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-strategy-basics.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

forbidden.pattern: Mission and vision statements are interchanged or fused.
OKR examples use verbs like 'improve' or 'enhance' without numeric KR.
